overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The journey transitions from narrow indoor corridors to bustling city streets, outdoor dining areas, and finally a waterfront promenade with towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service corridor with industrial piping

events.description: character exits indoor doorway into covered alleyway with neon signage
enters narrow green corridor with industrial pipes and ventilation
exits corridor to open city street with neon lights visible

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow corridors and industrial passageways toward the street

entered.detail: yellow and red illuminated sign above doorway entrance
white and orange striped construction barriers blocking road access
painted green concrete walls with industrial texture
metal ventilation ducts and pipes running along corridor ceiling
exterior street visible through corridor exit with striped crosswalk

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a doorway looking out toward a neon-lit street. The character walks through narrow green corridors with industrial piping and ventilation units, transitioning from an enclosed indoor space to an outdoor urban environment. Construction barriers and a shop sign are visible near the entrance.

events.description: character turns right to follow sidewalk along main street
passing parked vehicle on left side of sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along bustling city street with neon commercial signs and passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking in opposite direction wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: large red neon sign with Japanese characters reading 'The Phoenix'
rusted vintage car parked along the curb
multiple illuminated advertisements and holographic displays on building facades
wooden power pole with tangled electrical wires

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a neon-lit city street with moderate pedestrian traffic. A prominent red neon sign for 'The Phoenix' dominates the right side, while parked cars and various storefronts line the sidewalk. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with mixed lighting from street lamps and glowing advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk transitioning to outdoor dining

events.description: entering outdoor dining area with plastic seating and umbrellas

agents.ego_description: walking past concrete buildings with graffiti and entering an outdoor cafe seating area

notable_agents.action: sitting at outdoor cafe table under green umbrella

entered.detail: weathered concrete walls with visible stains and industrial texture
colorful spray-painted artwork on building facade
white and pink plastic chairs arranged around tables
large green patio umbrellas shading outdoor dining tables

segments.scene_description: The character continues along an urban sidewalk past concrete buildings adorned with graffiti. The scene transitions into an outdoor dining area with plastic chairs and green umbrellas. Pedestrians are visible both walking and seated at cafe tables, with neon signs glowing in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone alley leading to waterfront

events.description: exiting outdoor dining into narrow cobblestone alleyway
approaching waterfront with open view of water and distant skyline

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow cobblestone alley toward the waterfront with increasing openness

entered.detail: narrow passage with wet cobblestone pavement reflecting neon lights
metal garbage can with debris on top
green metal railing along the water's edge
calm water reflecting city lights and neon signs
tall buildings with illuminated windows visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the outdoor dining area and enters a narrow cobblestone alley with wet ground reflecting the neon lights. The space gradually opens up to reveal a waterfront with a green metal railing and calm water reflecting the distant illuminated skyline.

events.description: reaching waterfront with expansive view of water and massive skyscrapers
camera tilts upward to reveal full height of towering neon-lit buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along waterfront while observing and looking up at towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements

entered.detail: massive high-rise buildings covered in neon lights and holographic displays
giant digital advertisements projecting from building facades
elevated highway or monorail track crossing over the water
colorful neon reflections shimmering on the water surface

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the waterfront promenade with an expansive view of the water and massive skyscrapers towering overhead. The camera pans up to reveal the full scale of the buildings covered in holographic advertisements and neon lights, with their reflections dancing on the water surface. An elevated bridge structure spans across the right side of the view.

events.description: walking under large overpass bridge structure with concrete supports

agents.ego_description: walking along waterfront promenade under the shadow of the overpass bridge

notable_agents.action: sitting near a burning barrel under the bridge overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway overpass with support columns
metal barrel with fire burning inside providing warmth
thick concrete pillars holding up the elevated roadway

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along the waterfront promenade beneath a massive overpass bridge. The lighting becomes darker and more subdued under the concrete structure. A burning barrel provides warm light on the left side where a figure sits, while the city skyline remains visible in the distance through the bridge supports.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a cramped industrial interior into the vibrant, neon-lit expanse of a bustling cyberpunk city. It begins in a doorway, moving through narrow green corridors lined with industrial piping and ventilation units before passing construction barriers to exit the building. As the character emerges, the enclosed space opens into a wide city street dominated by the glowing red neon sign of The Phoenix and the reflections of parked cars. The scene then shifts along a graffiti-covered sidewalk, moving past concrete facades toward an outdoor dining area filled with green umbrellas and plastic chairs. Finally, the camera glides through the crowd of seated pedestrians and glowing advertisements, fully immersing the viewer in the urban nightlife.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, neon-lit alleyway into a vast waterfront promenade dominated by towering skyscrapers. It begins as the character leaves an outdoor dining area and enters a cobblestone alley with wet ground, which gradually opens up to reveal a green metal railing and calm water reflecting the distant skyline. As the character reaches the promenade, the camera pans upward to capture the massive scale of skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and an elevated bridge spanning the right side of the view. The scene then shifts as the character walks beneath a massive concrete overpass, where the lighting becomes darker and more subdued. Finally, the view settles under the bridge structure, where a burning barrel casts a warm glow on a seated figure while the city skyline remains visible through the supports.
